allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''catalogo_raw.json'',''utf-8''\)\); console.log\(''Marcas:'', d.length\); let total=0; d.forEach\(m => m.modelos.forEach\(mo => mo.anos.forEach\(a => total += a.chaves.length\)\)\); console.log\(''Total chaves:'', total\); console.log\(''Amostra:'', JSON.stringify\(d[0].modelos[0], null, 2\)\)")
